proposals.suggested_implementation: Generate scout/probe counterfactuals and review a narrow information-value scorer change.
proposals.title: Hidden coverage suspicion can make scouting or probing better than greedy setup, especially before committing an ace.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Adjust an offline feature weight or produce a small scorer-diff candidate for human review.
proposals.title: A guaranteed or near-guaranteed KO should dominate slow chip, status, or recovery when the target can punish passivity.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Improve the preference UI/query shape; do not change ROM behavior.
proposals.title: Several labels say the best answer is outside the displayed pair, so V2 queries must include switch and plan actions.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Draft a narrow ASM fail/discourage rule only after reviewing the listed examples.
proposals.title: Do not start a resisted ramp-lock sequence when it does not KO and the target can punish or switch.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Ask for more boundary labels before proposing a behavior change.
proposals.title: Sacrifice, switch, and attack can be near-tie spots where the AI should preserve variety instead of becoming deterministic.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Ask for more boundary labels before proposing a behavior change.
proposals.title: Setup is good when it keeps or improves the damage race, not merely because setup is boss-flavored.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Ask for more boundary labels before proposing a behavior change.
proposals.title: One accuracy debuff can be correct when direct chip is worthless, but repeated debuffs lose value because switching clears them.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Draft a narrow ASM fail/discourage rule only after reviewing the listed examples.
proposals.title: Sleep is strong legal pressure, but fail states and Sleep Clause must gate it before taste scoring runs.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Generate scout/probe counterfactuals and review a narrow information-value scorer change.
proposals.title: Trajectory labels should teach when one scout/probe turn is worth more than immediate ace commitment.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Add plan/counterfactual coverage for the stop condition before any ROM change.
proposals.title: Multi-turn labels should teach bounded setup/status/lock lines with explicit branch and stop conditions instead of raw move weights.

proposals.suggested_implementation: Review move-vs-switch arbitration and add targeted switch-action fixtures first.
proposals.title: Trajectory labels should distinguish useful preservation switches from passive switching that gives up the fight.

demonstrations.human_summary: since roll out does very little damage, spam body slam until paralyze and milk drink to heal chip when around 60%, then finally set up roll out to start building

Sleep Powder first: even though it is inaccurate, landing sleep creates the free turn to Swords Dance. Then Victreebel should pressure with Sludge Bombs and only put Snorlax back to sleep after it wakes up, making sure Sleep Clause is not violated.

Same pattern as Erika: Sleep Powder first, then use the sleep turn to Quiver Dance, then attack with Giga Drain. If Lapras wakes up and Sleep Clause is free, Sleep Powder can be reapplied before continuing pressure.
